title: On The Great Buried Bottle
content:
BY DR. DELANY

    Amphora, quae moestum linquis, laetumque revises
        Arentem dominum, sit tibi terra levis.
    Tu quoque depositum serves, neve opprime, marmor;
        Amphora non meruit tam pretiosa mori.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Jonathan Swift, titled "On The Great Buried Bottle", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
